GAZETTE OF INI)IA : EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII-SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th'A?ril,2015 S.O. 1013(E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 109 and clause (k) of sub- . section (1) of section 110 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), read with sub-rule (1) of rule 124 of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Governmentof India in the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) number S.O. 1365(E) dated the l?th December, 2004, publishedin Part-II, Section 3, Sub- section (ii) of the Gazette oflndia, Extraordinary, namely:- . (2) In the said notification, in the Table, in serial number 47 and for the entries thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:- · · I market tor pilot I demonstration projects I - - I I . intended for Government Scheme I "47, (a) The type approval of hybrid electric AIS-102 (Part 1)-2009 and 151October, 2012 vehicles specified in the standard. AIS 102 (Part 2)-2010, as . amended from time to time. (b) Type approval procedure for electric and AIS-131: 2015 With effect from date hybrid · electric vehicles introduced in of notification". I - - ,- [F. No. RT-11028/01/2015-MVL] SANJA Y BANDOP ADHY A YA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 1365(E), dated the 13th December, 2004 and last amended vide number S.O. 2590(E) dated the 8th October, 2014.
